maxtoki-mlx torch_pipeline
  • scripts.torch_pipeline.perturbation
  • View page source

scripts.torch_pipeline.perturbation

Token-level gene perturbation (delete / overexpress / inhibit).

Mirrors maxtoki_mlx.perturbation.perturb_tokens so the score we compute on the BioNeMo PyTorch model is directly comparable to the MLX path.

scripts.torch_pipeline.perturbation.perturb_tokens(token_ids: list[int], gene_token: int, direction: Literal['delete', 'overexpress', 'inhibit'], bos_id: int, eos_id: int) → list[int][source]
